title: LaunchSprint
description: LaunchSprint turns one product profile into recommended launch places, channel-specific drafts, risk checks, manual submission tracking, launch content plans, and reusable launch memory.

title: Quik.day
description: AI command console for email, calendar, tasks, and social workflows. Designed to reduce tab-switching and help users plan, approve, and execute work from one place.

title: TaleLingo
description: Story-based German learning app for Vietnamese speakers, combining short stories, audio, contextual vocabulary, and grammar practice.

title: JobPiloteer
description: AI-powered job application automation that helps users generate tailored applications faster while keeping human review in the loop.

title: Quill Social
description: AI assistant for managing content campaigns across multiple social platforms.

title: Vendex.io
description: A platform experiment around vending, IoT, and enterprise software workflows.

title: Forma
description: A no-code workflow platform for helping non-technical teams create custom business processes.

title: Sqly.ai
description: Natural language interface for querying databases in English.
